description: Create /pages/mpds.html - complete MPDS product page with color-coded keywords, question-style content, premium table, and error-free premium calculator
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mpds.html following the structure of /pages/mdla.html as a template

Include: DOCTYPE, html lang=id, head with meta charset, viewport, title 'MPDS - Manulife Perlindungan Diri Syariah | PROJECTCUAN', meta description, preconnect fonts, link to /assets/style.css, dark mode script, and inline <style> block

Define CSS variables for MPDS green theme (--mpds-green: #00875A, --mpds-dark: #006838, --mpds-light: #00C978) and .kw-blue, .kw-gold, .kw-green classes with dark mode variants matching mdla.html pattern
Add page-specific styles for calculator (calc-option-grid, calc-result-box patterns from mdla.html), premium tables, and section layouts

HERO SECTION: Use .page-hero pattern with breadcrumb (Beranda > Produk > MPDS), product-code-badge '☪️ MPDS - Asuransi Jiwa Syariah', question-style title using .kw-blue/.kw-gold/.kw-green classes (e.g. 'Bagaimana Jika Ada Asuransi yang Memberikan Perlindungan Jiwa SEKALIGUS Mengembalikan Seluruh Kontribusi?'), product stats (Rp 250rb/bln minimum, 30hr-50thn usia masuk, 12 Tahun proteksi), WhatsApp CTA button + anchor to #kalkulator

KEUNGGULAN SECTION: Use .section with advantage-grid cards. Content in question style highlighting product benefits: Kontribusi Flat, Pengembalian Kontribusi (100%/70%), Proteksi Ganda (jiwa + kecelakaan), Terjangkau mulai 250rb/bln, Prinsip Syariah (tolong-menolong), Unisex tarif. Use .kw-blue/.kw-gold/.kw-green on key terms

MANFAAT SECTION: 3 main benefits with detail cards - (1) Santunan Meninggal Dunia (MPK 5th: 250x bulanan, MPK 12th: 450x bulanan), (2) Tambahan Manfaat Kecelakaan (50% santunan, maks 1.2M), (3) Pengembalian Kontribusi akhir tahun 12 (usia 0-40: 100%, usia 41-50: 70%). Write in question style

SPESIFIKASI/KETENTUAN SECTION: Table or cards showing - Masa Asuransi 12 tahun, MPK 5 atau 12 tahun, Usia Masuk 30 hari-50 tahun, Usia Pemegang Polis min 18 tahun, Min Kontribusi 250rb/bulan, Mata Uang IDR, Metode Pembayaran (Bulanan/Kuartalan/Semesteran/Tahunan), Full Underwriting

TABEL PREMI SECTION: Create premium lookup tables. MPK 12 Tahun table with rows for Usia 0-40 and 41-50, showing Kontribusi Tahunan (3jt & 5jt), Total Kontribusi, UP Jiwa, UP Kecelakaan, Pengembalian Maturity. Style with design system table patterns. Include note that MPK 5 tahun uses different multiplier (250x vs 450x)

KALKULATOR PREMI SECTION (id='kalkulator'): Build using calc-option-grid pattern from mdla.html. Inputs: (1) Masa Pembayaran Kontribusi - 5 Tahun / 12 Tahun toggle options, (2) Mode Pembayaran - Bulanan / Tahunan toggle options, (3) Usia Masuk Peserta - select dropdown 0-50, (4) Nominal Kontribusi - preset options (250rb, 300rb, 500rb, 750rb, 1jt, 1.5jt, 2jt, 2.5jt, 3jt, 5jt for bulanan; convert for tahunan using 8.333% factor) plus 'Lainnya' custom input

CALCULATOR JAVASCRIPT: Implement error-free calculator logic. Rules: (a) Convert input to monthly equivalent - if tahunan, monthly = input * 8.333/100 (i.e. yearly/12). (b) Santunan Asuransi Dasar = multiplier x kontribusi_bulanan (multiplier 250 for MPK 5, 450 for MPK 12). (c) Tambahan Kecelakaan = 50% x Santunan (cap at Rp 1,200,000,000). (d) Total Kontribusi = kontribusi_bulanan x 12 x MPK. (e) Pengembalian: usia<=40 -> 100% total, usia 41-50 -> 70% total. Display results in card-based layout similar to Sample/Mpds.html pattern

CALCULATOR VALIDATION: Ensure input validation - minimum kontribusi 250rb/bulan (or 3jt/tahun), usia must be 0-50, handle custom input with thousand-separator formatting (use dot separator for Indonesian locale), prevent NaN/undefined results

CALCULATOR PRESETS: For Bulanan mode use values [250000, 300000, 500000, 750000, 1000000, 1500000, 2000000, 2500000, 3000000, 5000000]. For Tahunan mode use values [3000000, 3600000, 6000000, 9000000, 12000000, 18000000, 24000000, 30000000, 36000000, 60000000]. When switching modes, rebuild the select options and recalculate

FAQ SECTION: Use .faq-list > .faq-item pattern (from main.js initFAQ). Include 8-10 questions covering: Apa itu MPDS, Berapa besar manfaat meninggal dunia, Bagaimana tambahan manfaat kecelakaan, Berapa pengembalian kontribusi, Perbedaan MPK 5 vs 12 tahun, Apa itu surplus underwriting, Apa yang terjadi jika menunggak, Bisakah polis lapse dipulihkan, Metode pembayaran tersedia, Siapa yang cocok
CTA SECTION: Use .cta-section with green gradient background, question-style heading (e.g. 'Sudahkah Anda Menyiapkan Perlindungan Terbaik untuk Keluarga Tercinta?'), WhatsApp CTA button

Add
and before closing body tag

Ensure all keyword terms throughout the page use .kw-blue (product name, proteksi), .kw-gold (emphasis words like SEKALIGUS, GRATIS), .kw-green (money/benefit terms like pengembalian, 100%) for colorful visual appeal

Verify calculator correctness: Test case 1: MPK=12, Bulanan=500000, Usia=30 -> Santunan=225jt, Kecelakaan=112.5jt, Total Kontribusi=72jt, Pengembalian=72jt (100%). Test case 2: MPK=5, Bulanan=1000000, Usia=45 -> Santunan=250jt, Kecelakaan=125jt, Total Kontribusi=60jt, Pengembalian=42jt (70%). Test case 3: MPK=12, Tahunan=60000000, Usia=35 -> Monthly=5000000, Santunan=2.25B, Kecelakaan=1.125B (capped at 1.2B so 1.125B OK), Total=720jt, Pengembalian=720jt
acceptance_criteria: Page follows same HTML structure pattern as mdla.html (style.css link, dark mode script, #site-header, sections, #site-footer, main.js script)
Keywords throughout the page use .kw-blue, .kw-gold, .kw-green CSS classes for color-coding
Content is written in question/persuasive style (pertanyaan) to make users think about product benefits
Complete product information from MPDS sources is present (manfaat, ketentuan, FAQ)
Premium table section shows lookup data for MPK 12 tahun (usia 0-40 and 41-50, kontribusi 3jt and 5jt)
Calculator handles all inputs: MPK (5/12), Mode Bayar (Bulanan/Tahunan), Usia (0-50), Nominal Kontribusi (presets + custom)
Calculator produces correct results: Santunan = multiplier x monthly, Kecelakaan = 50% santunan (max 1.2B), Total = monthly x 12 x MPK, Pengembalian = total x (100% or 70%)
Calculator handles tahunan mode correctly: monthly = yearly * 8.333% (i.e. yearly/12)
No JavaScript errors - calculator works without console errors
Dark mode support via html.dark class and CSS variable overrides
verification: Run: grep -c 'kw-blue\|kw-gold\|kw-green' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mpds.html to confirm keyword classes are used (should be >10)
Run: grep -c 'site-header\|site-footer\|main.js\|style.css' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/mpds.html to confirm proper structure (should be 4+)
Run: node -e to validate calculator logic inline - test key formulas produce expected outputs
